user.title: Solar Windows — global settings
user.description: Configure how sun detection works. You'll add your windows in the next step.

data.sun_cone: Sun cone width (degrees either side of window facing)

data.name: Window name (e.g. Living room south window)
data.add_another: Add another window after this one

error.no_windows: You must add at least one window.
error.invalid_facing: Please select a valid compass direction.

error.invalid_windows_json: Invalid JSON. Each window needs 'name' and 'facing' (N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW).
